prompt: Dreamy Y2K-inspired collage portrait of a confident young woman in a vibrant aesthetic scrapbook composition. Multiple candid and editorial-style photos of the same girl are layered creatively with playful angles — mirror selfies, laughing close-ups, rooftop standing pose, headphone candid, and soft blurry motion shots. She wears trendy streetwear including an oversized denim jacket, black crop top, cargo pants, chunky sneakers, and silver accessories.
